title: Planned power outage: George South
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of George South, Newton Street, on Wednesday 24 April from 09:00 to 16:30 for alterations to the electrical mains.


> Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.


Should circumstances prevent the work from being carried out during the abovementioned period; the work will be done on Wednesday 1 May from 09:00 to 16:30.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
